questions.question: users prints on a single line a blank-separated list of user names of users currently logged in to the current host.

questions.question: Each user name corresponds to a login session, so if a user has more than one login session, that user’s name will appear the same number of times in the output.

questions.question: The users command is installed only on platforms with the POSIX <utmpx.h> include file or equivalent, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence on non-POSIX platforms.
